    repo - Variable in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.api.AbstractTokenProvider
    Repository or project name

    Sets the repository or project name
    report(Issue) - Method in interface dk.tij.jissuesystem.api.IIssueProvider
    Reports a new issue to a provider.
    report(Issue) - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.core.IssueReporter
    Reports an issue after enriching it with diagnostics and validating against contract
    report(Issue) - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic.GenericProvider
    Reports a new issue to the configured issue endpoint.
    report(Issue) - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github.GitHubProvider
    Reports an issue to the repository via the repository_dispatch event.
